title: Internal Auditor
responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: PixelCraft is hiring a junior internal auditor to support reviewing financial processes, controls, and compliance activities.
raw_text: Vacancy V081: Internal Auditor at PixelCraft. Location: Odesa. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.3 years. Required skills: audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment, process review, compliance, data analysis. Optional skills: policy review, power bi. Responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation.
